items.name: folder-component
items.title: Folder Component
items.description: An animated folder whose cards fan out on hover and lift open on click, with a 3D-tilted flap.

items.name: elastic-dot
items.title: Elastic Dot
items.description: An elastic dot indicator that stretches and snaps fluidly to highlight the active item in sidebar navigation.

items.name: blossom-color-picker
items.title: Blossom Color Picker
items.description: An organic, blooming color picker component with smooth flower-like expansion transitions.
